name: Ping Pong
current_goal: Maintain the single-node intranet speed-test service with browser-scoped Recent Results, fixed homepage Quick 20s and Full 30s modes, proportional startup trimming, Raw CV and Stable CV throughput diagnostics, current-run Raw Data popup/CSV diagnostics, stability-first completion summaries, hotspot data-plan warning, required per-test Wired/Wi-Fi labeling, current connection IP visibility, Web Worker execution, HTML/PNG/Markdown IT diagnostic report export, local-throttled maintenance self-tests, a desktop one-screen dashboard, Admin Console controls, local production health, OctoPulse visibility, and repo-visible reusable documentation.
latest_summary: Committed and pushed the fixed-height warning carousel update to origin/main. The homepage warning carousel uses shortened one-line copy, overflow-only marquee animation, 64px desktop/tablet height, 72px mobile height, 2-second auto-rotation with hover/focus pause, and red hotspot title styling.
next_action: Decide whether the pre-existing .gitignore, AGENTS.md, deleted Ping-Pong project docx, untracked HTML specification, docs/analysis-data-debugging.md, and docs/speed-test-statistics-whitepaper.md changes are intentional.

last_commands: Browser warning carousel QA at 1191x964, 1089x964, 1280x900, 1710x1021, and 390x844
verification.notes: Homepage warning-carousel verification passed. Typecheck, full Vitest suite (87 tests), whitespace diff check, and production build passed. The PORT=8200 npm start service was restarted after the final build and /api/health returned ok. Browser QA confirmed page identity, nonblank content, no framework overlay, no console warnings/errors, fixed warning heights at 64px for 1191x964, 1089x964, 1280x900, and 1710x1021, fixed 72px warning height at 390x844, no Download/Jitter or Upload/HTTP Loss overlap, no warning-driven full-page height growth on desktop viewports, mobile vertical scroll remained reachable, hotspot title color computed as rgb(180, 35, 24), auto-rotation moved between 1/2 and 2/2 at about 2-second intervals, focus pause kept the selected warning stable after the next control received focus, and long mobile warning copy used .is-marquee without increasing card height. Browser screenshot capture timed out during evidence collection, so rendered QA evidence was DOM, computed style, console, and interaction state. Commit 2a313e0 was pushed to origin/main after fetching origin/main and confirming no remote divergence.

attention: Working tree remains dirty beyond .ai/status.json because of pre-existing .gitignore and AGENTS.md edits, a deleted Ping-Pong project docx, untracked Ping-Pong-Project-Specification.html, docs/analysis-data-debugging.md, and docs/speed-test-statistics-whitepaper.md.
.ai/status.json was refreshed after the push and is intentionally uncommitted as the current delivery-state snapshot.
The branch now tracks origin/main and is not ahead or behind after the push.
The running service uses .env PORT=8200, not the README default 8080.
Local throttled runs are maintenance checks only; a non-local intranet device test is still required to evaluate real network performance.
